articles.title: Dashlane explains how attackers managed to download encrypted password vaults
articles.content: By targeting large numbers of users, attackers increased their chances of success.
articles.titleZh: Dashlane解释了攻击者如何设法下载加密密码保管库
articles.contentZh: 通过瞄准大量用户，攻击者增加了他们成功的机会。

articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.content: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.
articles.titleZh: 无法理解Dashlane的保管库盗窃通知？你并不孤单。
articles.contentZh: 安全警告漏掉了关键细节。Dashlane保持完全安静。

articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.content: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
articles.titleZh: 数十个红帽软件包通过其官方NPM渠道进行后门
articles.contentZh: 下载受影响的红帽软件包的任何人都应立即进行调查。

articles.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
articles.content: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.
articles.titleZh: 拆除了超过1700万台设备的僵尸网络
articles.contentZh: 据报道，该僵尸网络与一家位于俄罗斯的住宅代理网络连接。

articles.title: I customized a MacBook Neo with colorful spare parts
articles.content: The MacBook Neo is Apple's cheapest laptop, its most colorful, and its easiest to repair in years. That means owners can buy replacement parts in all four of its available colors and swap them in on their own. So that got us thinking: What if we bought a Neo just to see how funky we […]
articles.titleZh: 我用五颜六色的备件定制了MacBook Neo
articles.contentZh: MacBook Neo是苹果最便宜的笔记本电脑，色彩最丰富，也是多年来最容易维修的笔记本电脑。这意味着车主可以购买所有四种颜色的替换零件，并自行更换。这让我们想到：如果我们买了一个NEO ，只是为了看看我们[…]

articles.title: Porsche’s Cayenne Coupe Turbo will even make 911 owners nervous
articles.content: Back in 2002, Porsche fans sputtered with rage as the Cayenne made its debut at the Paris Motor. More than 20 years later, Porsche now sells more SUVs than anything else in its lineup. Last year, the Macan and Cayenne accounted for 62 percent of all Porsche sales. Now, these SUVs are trolling traditionalists in […]
articles.titleZh: 保时捷的Cayenne Coupe Turbo甚至会让911车主感到紧张
articles.contentZh: 早在2002年，当Cayenne在巴黎摩托车上首次亮相时，保时捷的粉丝们怒不可遏。20多年后，保时捷现在的SUV销量超过了其阵容中的任何车型。去年， Macan和Cayenne占保时捷总销量的62%。现在，这些SUV正在拖曳传统主义者[…]
